{{Quote|Stay calm, in moments we'll be able to create a medic. Then we can find Attichitcuk and bring him back.|Qui-Gon Jinn, to Chewbacca|audio=HerrDoktor.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
'''Wookiee medical droids''' were a model of [[Class one droid/Legends|class one droid]] [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droids]] built by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]].

==Description==
{{Quote|If any of your troopers are badly wounded, you should take a moment to apply first aid.|Qui-Gon Jinn, to Chewbacca|audio=SafetyFirst.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
Wookiee [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droids]]<ref name="GB" /> were [[Class one droid/Legends|Class one]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]]<ref name="Core Rulebook" /> built by members of the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They had a wide wheeled base, with a central tube connecting their lower body to their upper body and two further tubes running from their back to their base. The droid's upper body had two [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and a head on their upper body.<ref name="GB" />

==History==
{{Quote|Now, assemble your warriors and your medic at the edge of town and go find Attichitcuk.|Qui-Gon Jinn, to Chewbacca|audio=TU4-WNARN-L46.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
A Wookiee medical droid was built on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]]<ref name="GB" /> between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">The [[Alaris Prime colonial war|war]] for [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] as portrayed in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', was placed between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> during a [[Alaris Prime colonial war|war]] there between the [[Alaris Prime colonists|Wookiee colonists]] and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. The [[Wookiee Chieftain]] [[Attichitcuk/Legends|Attichitcuk]] had been [[Ambush of Attichitcuk|ambushed]] by the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Army]] and left for [[Death/Legends|dead]]. The Wookiee's [[Advisor/Legends|advisor]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], cautioned Attichitcuk's son, [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], to stay calm as they could create a [[Unidentified Wookiee medical droid|Wookiee medical droid]] to save him. The Wookiees built the medical droid at their [[command center]],<ref name="GB" /> and left their [[Unidentified Wookiee base (Attichitcuk's rescue)|base]] to save the cheiftain after ten [[bowcaster trooper]]s had been trained.<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> The Wookiees fought through several [[Battle Droid Beta Version]]s on their way to Attichitcuk, where the medical droid was able to revive the chieftain to the point that he could walk again. Jinn advised the Wookiees that their medical droid could heal them in between [[lightfight]]s. The Wookiees successfully escorted Attichituck back to their base in spite of further Trade Federation attacks.<ref name="GB" />

Wookiee medical droids were later used during the [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|Liberation of Kashyyyk]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wookiee medical droids were first mentioned in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' by [[Steven L. Kent]],<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>—released on [[November 7]], [[2001]]<ref name="PrimaDate">{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Galactic-Battlegrounds-Official/dp/0761537503|text=Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide}}</ref>—before appearing in the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'',<ref name="GB" /> released on [[November 11]], 2001.<ref name="GBDate">{{GameSpot|url=games/star-wars-galactic-battlegrounds|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}}</ref>
